title: Sweet & Gooey Ukrainian Potato Roll
description: A sweet and gooey brunch dish featuring fermented potatoes with a touch of sweetness to satisfy any craving for comfort food.

ingredients.name: Potatoes
ingredients.notes: Russet or Yukon Gold potatoes are ideal

instructions: Wash and peel the potatoes. Cut them into small cubes.
Place the potato cubes in a pot with enough cold water to cover them. Bring to boil, then reduce heat and simmer for about 20-30 minutes until tender but not falling apart when pierced.

Drain the potatoes well and let cool slightly before transferring to a food processor or blender. Add flour, butter, sugar, vanilla extract, salt, and pumpkin pie spice. Process until smooth and creamy.
Preheat oven to 180°C (350°F). Grease a small baking dish with additional butter.
Pour the potato mixture into the prepared dish. Press it down evenly with the back of a spoon.
Beat eggs one at a time, alternating with tablespoons of potato mixture in a separate bowl until well combined.
Brush tops of rolls with more melted butter and sprinkle lightly with granulated sugar if desired.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown. Cool slightly before serving.
